name: vortos/vortos-backup
description: Vortos Backup — enterprise-grade database backups: streamed pg_dump/pg_basebackup + WAL PITR and mongodump to an object store (R2), integrity-verified at creation, append-only catalog, GFS retention with hard safety floors, encryption-ready stream seam (Block 20), and a Block-17-ready alerting event seam. Built on the OpsKit driver pattern.

suggest.ext-pgsql: For Postgres backups (requires pg_dump/pg_basebackup binaries on the host)
suggest.ext-mongodb: For Mongo backups (requires the mongodump binary on the host)
